markdown:
#  Use Bulk Actions > Retrieve in the Submittals Tool 
##  Background 
Use the Bulk Actions > Retrieve menu command when you want to retrieve a batch of submittals from the Recycle Bin.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Supported Views:**
    * The Bulk Actions > Retrieve menu command is only supported in the Submittals tool's Recycle Bin.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To use other supported menu commands in the Bulk Actions menu, see [Perform Bulk Actions on Submittals](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/perform-bulk-actions-on-submittals).
    * If you want to retrieve an individual submittal, see [Retrieve a Submittal from the Recycle Bin](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/retrieve-a-submittal-from-the-recycle-bin).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click the **Recycle Bin** link. Then:
     * To select all of the submittals in the list, mark the checkbox at the top of the left column.  
OR
     * To select one or more of the submittals in the list, mark the check box to the left of each desired submittal.
  3. Choose **Bulk Actions** > **Retrieve**.  
This reveals a list of the selected submittals.
  4. Click **Retrieve**.   
A GREEN Retrieve Succeeded message appears when the retrieve action is complete. The system also removes the submittals from the Recycle Bin.


## See Also
  * [Use Bulk Actions > Delete in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-delete-in-the-submittals-tool)
  * [Perform Bulk Actions on Submittals](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/perform-bulk-actions-on-submittals)
  * [Delete a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/delete-a-submittal)
title: Use Bulk Actions > Retrieve in the Submittals Tool
description: How to use the Bulk Actions menu in the Submittals tool to perform bulk retrivals on a batch of submittals.
